title: YouTube Scraper
description: Scrape YouTube videos, channels, playlists, and search results. Extract titles, view counts, likes, comments, subtitles, and more.

searchTerms.title: Search Terms
searchTerms.description: List of YouTube search keywords to scrape results for.

youtubeUrls.title: YouTube URLs
youtubeUrls.description: Direct YouTube video, channel, or playlist URLs to scrape.

maxResults.title: Maximum Results
maxResults.description: Maximum number of videos to scrape across all search terms and URLs.

scrapeSubtitles.title: Scrape Subtitles
scrapeSubtitles.description: Whether to extract video subtitles/captions (increases runtime).

videoType.title: Video Type
videoType.description: Filter search results by video type.

dateFilter.title: Upload Date Filter
dateFilter.description: Filter search results by upload date.
